Spotlight: Runner-up in maiden hurdles at Clonmel in May and Punchestown last month; failed to match that form at Wexford last Friday; interesting that he makes a quick reappearance with Colin Keane booked; turf Flat form is modest but not without a chance if reproducing last winter's best AW form.

RaceName: August Festival August 13th - 16th Handicap
Spotlight: Point winner; won a Down Royal maiden hurdle in 2025; varied campaign this year; ran well up to the point of a fall two out in a chase at this venue in April; maiden on the Flat, runner-up three times; in rear at Dundalk in March.

RaceName: August Festival August 13th - 16th Handicap
Spotlight: Three-time hurdles winner (also chase winner); 0-22 on Flat; fair placed form last season, though beaten 11l when third in this race 12 months ago; needs to step up on this term's outings at Gowran and Limerick.

RaceName: August Festival August 13th - 16th Handicap
Spotlight: Won two handicap hurdles for Gavin Cromwell in May 2023, both on good-to-yielding ground; has struggled over hurdles in recent seasons; has changed stable and now has his first Flat run since 2022.

RaceName: August Festival August 13th - 16th Handicap
Spotlight: Maiden gelding by Frankel; started his career with the Gosdens; has shown potential for a belated breakthrough in his two most recent races; recovered from interference at the start to finish fourth over this trip at Down Royal in May; leading contender based on his second to solid yardstick Jurality over 1m5f at Navan; same good 7lb claimer aboard now.

RaceName: August Festival August 13th - 16th Handicap
Spotlight: Veteran with 2-39 Flat turf record; most recent success was in 2022; often placed, including over hurdles; 33-1 when putting in a satisfactory display at Sligo a month ago on his first Flat outing this year.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
OwnerName: R Miles, V Miles, T Stamp & Partner
Spotlight: Record of ten wins from 34 starts on the AW; goes particularly well here, gaining fourth course success when scoring by 14l over 2m nine days ago; this trip no problem; will be hard to beat with a 5lb penalty.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
Spotlight: Both wins have been over C&D, the latest in April when tongue-tie was on for first time; not been in quite such good form since.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
Spotlight: Consistent; won three on the bounce on AW over 1m4f in January/February; fair second at Beverley on Friday; stays 1m6f; each-way chance.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
Spotlight: Decent hurdler (2l last of four in handicap at Market Rasen last month); fair run when 3l seventh of 12 over C&D on latest AW start (September 2025); place chance.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
Spotlight: Best run when third at Ffos Las on handicap debut last month (1m4f, good to soft); tailed off here next time (well beaten previous AW run); bit to prove.

RaceName: Sky Sports Racing Sky 512 Handicap
Spotlight: Unexposed; fair 6.5l fifth over 1m4f here on handicap debut last time; needs to improve for this step up in trip.

RaceName: fairplaybet.co.uk Bet £20 Get £20 Free Bets Handicap
Spotlight: Scored on the AW in March and recorded his first win on turf over C&D (good) four weeks ago; tends to be slowly away but finishes strongly; holds strong claims to go in again off 4lb higher.

RaceName: fairplaybet.co.uk Bet £20 Get £20 Free Bets Handicap
OwnerName: K Hunter, D Leon And Hunscote Stud Ltd
Spotlight: 0-9 but ran his best race this year when third of eight at Goodwood (5f, good) last month in first-time cheekpieces (retained); just needs a bit more to shed his maiden tag.

RaceName: fairplaybet.co.uk Bet £20 Get £20 Free Bets Handicap
Spotlight: Has three AW wins at Wolverhampton and got off the mark on turf over C&D in May off 7lb lower; placed twice since and should go close.

RaceName: fairplaybet.co.uk Bet £20 Get £20 Free Bets Handicap
Spotlight: Trailblazer who is not the force he once was, but was runner-up at Windsor (5f, good to firm) last month; should give his supporters a run for their money but vulnerable to a late closer.

RaceName: fairplaybet.co.uk Bet £20 Get £20 Free Bets Handicap
Spotlight: Has six wins to his name but yet to score for his current trainer; best recent effort when runner-up at Lingfield (5f, AW) last month; not out of this.
